x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Post-incident review data allows Now Assist to identify systemic failure patterns and generate recurrence prevention recommendations. Low PIR coverage means this AI capability has no historical data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Link all resolved P1 incidents to a Problem record using the OOB Problem field (problem_id). Enforce via a mandatory field policy on P1 resolution or an automated workflow that creates a problem record for every P1. Do not use custom relationship tables — Now Assist reads the OOB problem_id reference field.
